title: oxalis aurea
intro: Oxalis aurea, also known as the golden wood sorrel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Oxalis aurea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic, making it useful for treating urinary tract infections and other health conditions. Oxalis aurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
